headline: EVENING WRAP — Mar 3, 2026
telegramText: EVENING WRAP — Mar 3, 2026 Crypto markets are surging on institutional inflows and ETF momentum while oil prices spike amid geopolitical tensions, creating a mixed risk‑on for crypto and risk‑off for equities. SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle: BTC bottom forming signals the end of the four‑year cycle. ↑ Stagflation: Oil spike combined with inflationary risk. ↑ Displacement: Iran conflict drives displacement and geopolitical risk. CONTRARIAN • Sell BTC anticipating a correction due to ETF saturation and short‑term volatility. • Buy SPY expecting an equity rally if the Fed eases policy amid inflation concerns. TOMORROW WATCH 🟢 BTC: Institutional ETF inflows and short liquidation wave support a bullish stance. 🛡️ OIL: Geopolitical risk and price spike warrant protective exposure. NEWS FLAGS ⚠️ AMKR [watch]: FormFactor, Amkor, Kulicke and Soffa, and Entegris Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know ⚠️ KLIC [watch]: FormFactor, Amkor, Kulicke and Soffa, and Entegris Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know ⚠️ BTC-USD [watch]: Sell BTC anticipating a correction due to ETF saturation and short‑term volatility. ⚠️ SPY: Buy SPY expecting an equity rally if the Fed eases policy amid inflation concerns.
